patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -1,11 +1,11 @@
-/* PWM Driver API - pwm_drv.h */
+/* PWM Driver API - pwm_drv.h (BREAKING: duty scale changed from 10000 to 65535) */
 #ifndef PWM_DRV_H
 #define PWM_DRV_H
 
 #include <stdint.h>
 
-/* Duty cycle expressed as 0-10000 (0.00% to 100.00%) */
-#define PWM_DUTY_MAX    10000U
+/* BREAKING: Duty cycle now expressed as 0-65535 (full 16-bit range) */
+#define PWM_DUTY_MAX    65535U
 
 typedef enum {
     PWM_CH0 = 0,
